name: cli-external-orchestration
description: Parent hub for external CLI dispatch: routes to three workflow modes, cli-opencode (OpenCode CLI orchestrator: external dispatch, in-OpenCode parallel sessions, cross-AI handback), cli-claude-code (Claude Code CLI executor: Anthropic-backed reasoning, edits, reviews, structured cross-AI handoff), and cli-codex (Codex CLI executor: OpenAI-backed coding, review, and web research; fails closed when codex is absent), through mode-registry.json and hub-router.json. The advisor sees one hub identity; workflowMode selects the packet. All three modes orchestrate a CLI binary and their dispatched writes land in this repo's workspace, so none is a transport packet.
trigger_examples: Delegate this to OpenCode for a full-runtime dispatch
Use cli-claude-code to get an Anthropic-backed second opinion
Run this task through opencode run with the deepseek provider
Use cli-codex for an OpenAI-backed code review and web-research pass
